examples: A quant will troll through tons and tons of data, looking for patterns.
In the popular press I keep reading about how quant models need to be improved.
Other regulators would prefer to leave the former quant to implement his belated turnaround plan.
Remember in 2011, even Goldman Sachs would close down their quant Global Alpha fund.
Not just look at quant data but what people are actually trying to do.
